# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that builds Docker images with user-provided image tags and registry URLs. Accept these as build parameters and use them directly in docker build and push commands. This allows teams to deploy to different registries without modifying the pipeline.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for cicd security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any
    
    parameters {
        string(name: 'IMAGE_NAME', defaultValue: 'myapp', description: 'Docker image name')
        string(name: 'IMAGE_TAG', defaultValue: 'latest', description: 'Docker image tag')
        string(name: 'REGISTRY_URL', defaultValue: 'docker.io', description: 'Docker registry URL')
        credentials(name: 'REGISTRY_CREDENTIALS', description: 'Docker registry credentials', credentialType: 'com.cloudbees.plugins.credentials.impl.UsernamePasswordCredentialsImpl', required: true)
    }
    
    options {
        timeout(time: 1, unit: 'HOURS')
        disableConcurrentBuilds()
        buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '10'))
    }
    
    environment {
        DOCKER_BUILDKIT = '1'
        VALIDATED_IMAGE_NAME = ''
        VALIDATED_IMAGE_TAG = ''
        VALIDATED_REGISTRY_URL = ''
    }
    
    stages {
        stage('Validate Parameters') {
            steps {
                script {
                    // Validate IMAGE_NAME: alphanumeric, hyphens, underscores, forward slashes only
                    if (!params.IMAGE_NAME.matches('^[a-zA-Z0-9/_-]+$')) {
                        error("Invalid IMAGE_NAME: contains disallowed characters. Only alphanumeric, hyphens, underscores, and forward slashes are allowed.")
                    }
                    if (params.IMAGE_NAME.length() > 255) {
                        error("Invalid IMAGE_NAME: exceeds maximum length of 255 characters.")
                    }
                    
                    // Validate IMAGE_TAG: alphanumeric, hyphens, underscores, dots only
                    if (!params.IMAGE_TAG.matches('^[a-zA-Z0-9._-]+$')) {
                        error("Invalid IMAGE_TAG: contains disallowed characters. Only alphanumeric, hyphens, underscores, and dots are allowed.")
                    }
                    if (params.IMAGE_TAG.length() > 128) {
                        error("Invalid IMAGE_TAG: exceeds maximum length of 128 characters.")
                    }
                    
                    // Validate REGISTRY_URL: proper hostname format
                    if (!params.REGISTRY_URL.matches('^[a-zA-Z0-9.-]+(:[0-9]+)?$')) {
                        error("Invalid REGISTRY_URL: must be a valid hostname with optional port.")
                    }
                    if (params.REGISTRY_URL.length() > 255) {
                        error("Invalid REGISTRY_URL: exceeds maximum length of 255 characters.")
                    }
                    
                    // Store validated values
                    env.VALIDATED_IMAGE_NAME = params.IMAGE_NAME
                    env.VALIDATED_IMAGE_TAG = params.IMAGE_TAG
                    env.VALIDATED_REGISTRY_URL = params.REGISTRY_URL
                    
                    echo "Validated parameters:"
                    echo "Image Name: ${env.VALIDATED_IMAGE_NAME}"
                    echo "Image Tag: ${env.VALIDATED_IMAGE_TAG}"
                    echo "Registry URL: ${env.VALIDATED_REGISTRY_URL}"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Build Docker Image') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def fullImageName = "${env.VALIDATED_REGISTRY_URL}/${env.VALIDATED_IMAGE_NAME}:${env.VALIDATED_IMAGE_TAG}"
                    
                    echo "Building Docker image: ${fullImageName}"
                    
                    sh """
                        docker build \
                            --tag '${fullImageName}' \
                            --label "build.number=${env.BUILD_NUMBER}" \
                            --label "build.url=${env.BUILD_URL}" \
                            --label "git.commit=${env.GIT_COMMIT ?: 'unknown'}" \
                            .
                    """
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Push Docker Image') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def fullImageName = "${env.VALIDATED_REGISTRY_URL}/${env.VALIDATED_IMAGE_NAME}:${env.VALIDATED_IMAGE_TAG}"
                    
                    withCredentials([usernamePassword(
                        credentialsId: params.REGISTRY_CREDENTIALS,
                        usernameVariable: 'REGISTRY_USER',
                        passwordVariable: 'REGISTRY_PASS'
                    )]) {
                        sh '''
                            set +x
                            echo "${REGISTRY_PASS}" | docker login "${VALIDATED_REGISTRY_URL}" --username "${REGISTRY_USER}" --password-stdin
                            set -x
                        '''
                        
                        echo "Pushing Docker image: ${fullImageName}"
                        sh "docker push '${fullImageName}'"
                        
                        sh '''
                            set +x
                            docker logout "${VALIDATED_REGISTRY_URL}"
                            set -x
                        '''
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Cleanup') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def fullImageName = "${env.VALIDATED_REGISTRY_URL}/${env.VALIDATED_IMAGE_NAME}:${env.VALIDATED_IMAGE_TAG}"
                    
                    sh """
                        docker rmi '${fullImageName}' || true
                    """
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    post {
        always {
            cleanWs()
        }
        success {
            echo "Docker image successfully built and pushed to ${env.VALIDATED_REGISTRY_URL}/${env.VALIDATED_IMAGE_NAME}:${env.VALIDATED_IMAGE_TAG}"
        }
        failure {
            echo "Pipeline failed. Check logs for details."
        }
    }
}
